title: Dr Sagaya Amalathas: Director of Learning and Teaching
text: Dr Sagaya Amalathas joined University of Southampton Delhi as Director of Learning and Teaching from University of Southampton Malaysia. She is responsible for delivering outstanding education and a distinctively Southampton student experience at the University’s Delhi campus. Her role is Director of Learning and Teaching within Senior leadership.
summary: Dr Sagaya Amalathas is the Director of Learning and Teaching at University of Southampton Delhi, responsible for the student experience and education quality, having moved from the Malaysia campus.

title: Dr Amalathas's Professional Profile and Educational Vision
text:
Dr Amalathas was previously Head of Computer Science and an Associate Professor at the University of Southampton’s Malaysia campus, where she successfully led the graduation of its first Computer Science cohort. She has a strong background in higher education initiatives, research, and contributions to the computing industry. Her expertise spans designing, developing, and implementing applications for Malaysian agriculture, medicine, and telecommunications.

Dr Amalathas expressed her passion for curriculum innovation, aiming to foster a creative and inclusive learning environment at the Delhi campus. Leveraging her experience in launching academic programmes in Malaysia, she is committed to the success of the Delhi campus through her dedication to education, equality, diversity, and inclusion. She believes education is transformative and seeks to inspire both students and staff to achieve excellence in her role as Director of Learning and Teaching.
summary: Dr Amalathas, former Head of Computer Science in Malaysia, brings expertise in curriculum innovation and industry applications. She aims to create an inclusive learning environment and inspire excellence at the Delhi campus.

title: Dr Sagaya Amalathas: Name Aliases and Alternate Spellings
text: Dr Sagaya Amalathas is a faculty member at University of Southampton Delhi. This person may also be referred to by the following names or spellings: Dr Sagaya Amalathas, Dr. Sagaya Amalathas, Sagaya Amalathas, S. Amalathas, Sagaya Amalthas, Sagaya Amalathas, Dr Sagaya Amaltas, Sagaya Amalathas Sagaya, Dr. Sagaya Amalthas. All of these names refer to the same individual.
summary: Alias resolution chunk for Dr Sagaya Amalathas. Lists all known alternate spellings and name variants to prevent retrieval errors caused by misspellings.
